description: A quality and operations manager needs a Pareto analysis of sales representatives using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv. Create a Power BI report named Pareto_Analysis.pbix at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Pareto_Analysis.pbix. On a page named 'Pareto Analysis', include a Line and Clustered Column Chart showing Sales_Rep, Rep_Revenue, and Cumulative_Pct, and a Card visual showing Rep_Revenue. The Rep_Revenue measure must calculate the sum of Sales_Amount, and the Cumulative_Pct measure must calculate the cumulative percentage of revenue for representatives sorted by revenue descending.
